title: Forum Intelligence & Use Case Scraper
summary: Research dossier already existed with comprehensive intelligence from r/EvenRealities, GitHub, and tech forums. Verified all deliverable requirements are met.

deliverables.description: Complete forum intelligence dossier with 6 major sections covering R1 ring workarounds, HAO 2.0 optimization, 23+ advanced use cases, pain points, community tools, and feature requests

r1_ring_workarounds: Accidental Conversate activation: Community requests menu reordering to put less disruptive items first
Ring disconnection after water exposure: Must place in charging pod to restart
HUD randomly pops up: Restart glasses to reset
Bluetooth disconnection with locked phone: Keep phone unlocked & app in foreground (iOS more affected)
hao_20_optimization: Auto-brightness calibration recommended - reports it can be too bright/dark
Max 1,200 nits brightness for outdoor navigation - text readable in daylight
Photo-fusion clip hides green line visibility for daytime use
Yellow clip reduces reflection for night driving
Adjust virtual distance for maximum peripheral vision and clarity
use_case_categories: Professional (7 cases): Tech sales, technical presentations, lecture notation, captioning, BS detection, language learning, translation
Content Creation (3 cases): Teleprompting, creator notes, public speaking
Daily Life & Wellness (7 cases): Health tracking, discreet notifications, walking navigation, AI queries, golf caddie, lyrics display, task management
Power User / Developer (6 cases): PC integration via Azure OpenAI, MentraOS third-party apps, BLE protocol reverse engineering, custom terminal teleprompter, headphone compatibility
critical_pain_points: R1 won't reconnect without charging pod
